title: [MTR3]Tianjin Metro Line 10 Train Pack
description: A train pack for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod
body:
# 简体中文
一个天津地铁10号线列车，具体可前往[MTRBBS](https://www.mtrbbs.top/thread-2519-1-1.html)查看。上传到这里是因为MTRBBS的下载服务有些问题。

# English
A resourcepack of Tianjin Metro Line 10. Go to [MTRBBS](https://www.mtrbbs.top/thread-2519-1-1.html)(in Chinese Only) for more details.
